headline: Xylem Inc (NYSE:XYL): A Dividend Quality Stock with Sustainable Growth and Strong Financial Health
summary: Xylem Inc. (XYL) offers a reliable 1.46% dividend with a 40.67% payout ratio and 9% annual growth. Strong profitability, low debt, and essential water infrastructure make this a solid pick for sustainable dividend investing.
